namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices.Contracts;

public sealed class DiaExceptionNotificationRequest
{
    public bool SendErrorEmail { get; init; }

    public bool LogError { get; init; }

    public string LogErrorTitle { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public string LogErrorProcessName { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public string ErrorEmailBody { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public string ErrorEmailSubject { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public string SenderConfigKey { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public string RecipientConfigKey { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public string LogErrorFormattedError { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public string LogType { get; init; } = string.Empty;
}

DiaExceptionNotificationRequest.cs

---------------------------------

Task NotifyAsync(
    DiaExceptionNotificationRequest request,
    Exception exception,
    CancellationToken ct = default);

public async Task NotifyAsync(
    DiaExceptionNotificationRequest request,
    Exception exception,
    CancellationToken ct = default)

-----------------------------------

request.SendErrorEmail
request.LogError
request.LogErrorTitle
request.LogErrorProcessName
request.ErrorEmailBody
request.ErrorEmailSubject
request.SenderConfigKey
request.RecipientConfigKey
request.LogErrorFormattedError
request.LogType

--------------------------------------

new Entity(LogsEntityName)
logEntity[LogNameField]
